content:
For Owl, presumably contacting the developer of the add-on would be your best bet.

Alternatively you could give the TB built-in Exchange implementation a try. https://wiki.mozilla.org/Thunderbird:Exchange

Note, for the latter it would be best to use the latest release version of TB - currently v148.0. Make sure to first create a backup of your Thunderbird profile in case you're upgrading from an older version. https://support.mozilla.org/en-US/kb/profiles-where-thunderbird-stores-user-data#w_backing-up-a-profile https://support.mozilla.org/kb/thunderbird-release
creator: christ1

content:
Hello there

Thunderbird stopped working. With the message : message, "can't load xpcom" This message is there because files are corrupted, or missing or mismatched following after a mismatched or failed update.


Deleting all folder from thunderbird Make an backup from the profile and be sure it s safe. Be sure that Thunderbird is deleted and all is deleted from the system if possible use a software cleaner. Use a new the latest thunderbird installer. https://www.thunderbird.net/en-US/thunderbird/all/ Be sure that you do not simply overwrite the old version on the desktop.

Disabling the antivirus In the meanwhile disable the anti virus and firewalls and Vpn service for a good moment. To be sure that these services aren t blocking something. Also antivirus can block certain files after updates.

Renaming folders If the reinstalled aren t working try to rename the existing Thunderbird map into oldThunderbird map and try to reinstall again.

You cant reinstall the new version because all of the software has to be deleted from the desktop and system. Try to use the software cleaner like cc cleaner from google.
creator: Googlethunderbird.

content:
Gehe zunächst in Konten-Einstellungen > Kontenname > Kopien & Ordner > Entwürfe speichern unter .... und überprüfe, ob der richtige Zielordner zum Speichern von Entwürfen gewählt ist oder ob - wie in meinem Bild - versehentlich der Ordner Posteingang als Zielordner angegeben ist.

Ist die Einstellung für das Speichern der Entwürfe korrekt, lade das Add-on "FolderFlags" von hier https://services.addons.thunderbird.net/En-uS/thunderbird/addon/folderflags/ herunter und installiere es in Thunderbird. Danach R-Klick auf den Posteingang > Eigenschaften > Ordnerkategorien öffnen und den Haken bei "Entwürfe" entfernen (zweites Bild)
creator: Mapenzi

content:
Per poter inquadrare il problema prova a fornire queste informazioni:

  1. Versione di Thunderbird
  2. Versione del sistema operativo
  3. Provider delle caselle email (Gmail, Libero, Hotmail, etc.)
  4. Tipologia di account (POP3, IMAP)
  5. Estensioni installate
  6. Messaggi di errore che vengono visualizzati durante l'utilizzo di Thunderbird
  7. Software di sicurezza eventualmente presenti (Antivirus e simili)
  8. Screenshot del problema (se utile a chiarire il contesto)
creator: @next
